title: Jan David Schneider - Bank of Canada
content:
- Ph.D. in Economics, KU Leuven, Belgium (2023)
ORCID Author Orcid Link RePEc Google Scholar
Jan David Schneider is a Senior Economist in the Monetary Policy and Financial Studies Division of the Canadian Economic Analysis Department. His current research interests include production networks, monetary policy, and identification in empirical macroeconomics.

### Assessing the US and Canadian neutral rates: 2026 update
